actions.description: Returns a full result of your query.
actions.name: getFullResult

properties.description: Query that will be answered.
properties.label: Query
properties.name: input

properties.description: The desired format for individual result pods.

items.description: The desired format for individual result pods.

properties.label: Format
properties.name: format

properties.description: Specifies a custom query location based on an IP address.
properties.label: IP
properties.name: ip

properties.description: Specify magnification of objects within a pod.
properties.label: Magnification
properties.name: mag

properties.description: What system of units to use for measurements and quantities.
properties.label: Units
properties.name: units

properties.description: Specify an approximate width limit for text and tables.
properties.label: Width
properties.name: width

properties.description: Specifies that only pods produced by the given scanner should be returned. e.g. "Numeric", "Data", "Traveling".
properties.label: Scanner
properties.name: scanner

properties.description: Specifies a custom query location based on a latitude/longitude pair. e.g. "40.42,-3.71", "40.11, -88.24", "0,0".
properties.label: Latitude Longitude
properties.name: latlong

properties.description: Specifies a custom query location based on a string. e.g. "The North Pole", "Beijing".
properties.label: Location
properties.name: location

properties.description: Specify an extended maximum width for large objects.
properties.label: Max Width
properties.name: maxwidth

properties.description: Specifies a pod state change, which replaces a pod with a modified version, such as displaying more digits of a large decimal value. e.g. "WeatherCharts:WeatherData__Past+5+years", "2@DecimalApproximation__More+digits".
properties.label: Pod State
properties.name: podstate

properties.description: Specifies a pod title to include in the result. e.g. "Basic+Information", "Image", "Alternative representations".
properties.label: Pod Title
properties.name: podtitle

properties.description: Specifies an assumption, such as the meaning of a word or the value of a formula variable. e.g. "*C.pi-_*Movie", "DateOrder_**Day.Month.Year--".
properties.label: Assumption
properties.name: assumption

properties.description: Specify an approximate width limit for plots and graphics. e.g. "100", "200".
properties.label: Plot Width
properties.name: plotwidth

properties.description: Force Wolfram Alpha to ignore case in queries.
properties.label: Ignore Case
properties.name: ignorecase

properties.description: The number of seconds to allow Wolfram Alpha to spend in the "format" stage for any one pod e.g. "0.5", "5.0".
properties.label: Pod Timeout
properties.name: podtimeout

properties.description: Allow Wolfram Alpha to reinterpret queries that would otherwise not be understood.
properties.label: Reinterpret
properties.name: reinterpret

properties.description: Allow Wolfram Alpha to try to translate simple queries into English.
properties.label: Translation
properties.name: translation

properties.description: The number of seconds to allow Wolfram Alpha to compute results in the "scan" stage of processing. e.g. "0.5", "5.0".
properties.label: Scan Timeout
properties.name: scantimeout

properties.description: The number of seconds to allow Wolfram Alpha to spend in the "parsing" stage of processing. e.g. "0.5", "5.0".
properties.label: Parse Timeout
properties.name: parsetimeout

properties.description: The total number of seconds to allow Wolfram Alpha to spend on a query. e.g. "0.5", "5.0".
properties.label: Total Timeout
properties.name: totaltimeout

properties.description: Specifies a pod ID to exclude from the result e.g. "Result", "BasicInformation: PeopleData", "DecimalApproximation".
properties.label: Exclude Pod ID
properties.name: excludepodid

properties.description: The number of seconds to allow Wolfram Alpha to spend in the "format" stage for the entire collection of pods. e.g. "0.5", "5.0".
properties.label: Format Timeout
properties.name: formattimeout

properties.description: Specifies a pod ID to include in the result e.g. "Result", "BasicInformation: PeopleData", "DecimalApproximation".
properties.label: Include Pod ID
properties.name: includepodid

clusterElements.title: Get Full Result

description: Wolfram Alpha Full Results returns the computed results of your query in a variety of formats.
name: wolframAlphaFullResults
title: Wolfram Alpha Full Results
